metadata.title: PDAC spatial ecology ED10 submission source-data package (2026-07-01)
metadata.description: Submission source-data package for a public-data spatial transcriptomics study of CAF-myeloid stromal architecture in pancreatic ductal adenocarcinoma. This archive contains the v3 submission-ready manuscript support package, including figure source data and Extended Data Fig. 10 source data. The associated code repository is https://github.com/zzf617128/pdac_spatial_ecology. Claim boundaries: GSE310352 CosMx evidence is interpreted at slide/FOV level, not patient/specimen level; TGF/EMT is interpreted as stromal-interface organization, not tumor-intrinsic EMT; no causal signaling or direct SPP1-CD44 validation is claimed.
